parent_sha: 6f8ea67da61718fb7e08ad7c4c5122a193e47b30
commit_subject: Add diff-consistency checker and checker-scoped catalog scope_mode
Comment audit: scope=scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1 + scripts/tests/check-diff-consistency.tests.ps1 + scripts/check-checker-registry.ps1 + scripts/tests/check-checker-registry.tests.ps1 + .github/pr-quality-gate/data/checker-registry.tsv + .github/pr-quality-gate/data/panel-misses.csv + .github/pr-quality-gate/gate-runner.ps1 + .github/pr-quality-gate/gate-runner.sh + .github/pr-quality-gate/pattern-catalog.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/pattern-catalog.sources/00-catalog.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/README.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/HIGH-TIER-SLUGS.md + .github/workflows/pr-gate-check.yml + .github/pr-quality-gate/audits/last.md, 15 new comment lines, all approved (reduced from 51 per the reduce-and-audit decision).
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:1: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: header - size-free deterministic checker; cross-block YAML rules live in the lens tier; the -Mode ref contract
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:7: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: header close
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:37: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: a git root commit has no parent, so diff against the empty-tree object instead of the nonexistent HEAD~1
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:38: approval_turn: user PR-review fix approval (Copilot finding) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: 5.1-safe - short-circuit on PS version before touching the PS6+ automatic var $IsWindows (undefined under StrictMode on 5.1)
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:63: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: a content line beginning with +++ is otherwise dropped by the diff hunk parser
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:64: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: the git no-newline diff marker is metadata, not a content line
- scripts/check-diff-consistency.ps1:89: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: files-touched is rename-blind + audits-excluded (the panel-ledger convention)
- scripts/check-checker-registry.ps1:1: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: header - the fail-loud parity-gate contract (registry to checker to catalog)
- scripts/check-checker-registry.ps1:7: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: header close
- .github/pr-quality-gate/gate-runner.ps1:215: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: checker-scoped rows emit a marker and are not rg-scanned
- .github/workflows/pr-gate-check.yml:44: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: SHA-pin v4 annotation on the new diff-consistency job checkout (mirrors existing jobs; comment-scanner-flagged)
- .github/workflows/pr-gate-check.yml:68: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: SHA-pin v4 annotation on the new diff-consistency-tests job checkout
- .github/workflows/pr-gate-check.yml:76: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: SHA-pin v4 annotation on the new checker-registry-parity job checkout
- scripts/tests/check-diff-consistency.tests.ps1:5: approval_turn: user reduce-and-audit batch approval (prep-then-review) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: standalone self-test (not Pester) usage note
